scripts.sync: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python sync_cypress.py
scripts.import: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python import_circleci.py
scripts.save: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python backup_db.py seed_data.json && echo 'Saved to seed_data.json'
scripts.e2e:headed:report: cd e2e && npx playwright test --headed; npx playwright show-report
